slices.focus: Custom drainage retrofit packets boost resident engagement
slices.summary: Shifted from generic outreach to personalized property-by-property packets with a plain-language drainage sketch, likely mitigation path, and missing documents checklist. Residents transformed from workshop ghosting to active follow-up within a week. Feels steadier now that residents have something concrete to act on, though still worried some will drop off at the contractor or documentation stage.
open_loops: Pilot a phone-friendly photo-page version of packets; needs small-scale test before wider rollout
Prevent resident drop-off from contractor delays or documentation gaps later in the process
Create a simple standardized visit note code system to distinguish different obstacle types
decisions: Replace jargon with plain language in all packets; add a review note box at the end explaining what was checked
Track handoff-to-visit conversion data with a lightweight success log to maintain morale
Refine key wording first based on repeated confusion, then build standardized follow-up note codes for obstacle types
